home.title: Build cybersecurity mastery through levels, practice, and validation.
home.body: HardenPath organizes learning into clear paths: fundamentals, authorized labs, quizzes, milestones, and badges. Each step targets a concrete skill.

course.premiumNotice: This module includes premium exercises or validation.

account.title: Training profile
account.body: Sign in to follow validations, resume paths, and unlock badges.
account.name: Name

ethics.title: HardenPath rules of engagement
ethics.body: Training happens within a legal, defensive, and responsible framework.
principles: Only run offensive tests on systems you own or have explicit permission to assess.
Prefer labs, CTFs, and isolated environments.
Document risk carefully and respect confidentiality.
Do not publish sensitive data, credentials, real exploitation evidence, or workflows aimed at unauthorized targets.
